DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SERVICE EMPLOYEES INTERNATIONAL UNION LOCAL 87 DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained, with one final leave to amend granted. Plaintiff must allege facts supporting allegations of failure to provide meal and rest breaks (3rd cause of action.) Plaintiff must comply with CCP section 382 to bring a representative action under B&P section 17200. Absent class certification, relief and restitution cannot extend beyond the named plaintiff. Harper vs. 24 Hour Fitness, Inc. (2008) 167 Cal.App. 4th 966. (5th cause of action.)(Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
